title: workflow.run_completed event
description: Emitted on the spec 002 event bus when a tool workflow run completes. Spec 012 emits this when ToolLaunch.completed_at is set by the attribution pass. Spec 024 subscribes to write workflow_run manifests; spec 024 calls artifact.list?projectId=... for artifact details on receipt.

contractVersion.description: Contract version. Increment on breaking payload changes.

source.description: Event source per spec 002 R-Source-1. Spec 012 always emits source='system' for this event.

toolLaunchId.description: The ToolLaunch row that just reached a terminal state (completed_at set).

completedAt.description: RFC-3339 timestamp written to ToolLaunch.completed_at by spec 012's attribution pass.

artifactIds.description: UUIDs of ProcessingArtifact rows attributed to this launch. Subscribers that need full artifact detail should call artifact.list?projectId=... on receipt rather than relying on this list alone.
